changeSet.author: eventify.dev
changeSet.comment: Create user_auth_provider table to track linked authentication providers per user.

changeSet.author: eventify.dev
changeSet.comment: Add has_password column to user table to track whether the user has a real password set.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE "user" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS has_password BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false;

changeSet.author: eventify.dev
changeSet.comment: Backfill has_password=true for all existing users (assume they registered with password).
changeSet.sql: UPDATE "user" SET has_password = true WHERE has_password = false;

changeSet.author: eventify.dev
changeSet.comment: Backfill LOCAL UserAuthProvider records for all existing users.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO user_auth_provider (user_id, provider, provider_email, linked_at) SELECT id, 'LOCAL', email, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM "user" ON CONFLICT (user_id, provider) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: eventify.dev
changeSet.comment: Add documentation comments for user_auth_provider table and columns.
